'''Wodenstam''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="GG11" /> located within the [[Wodenstam system/Legends|star system]] of the same name, a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Skine sector/Legends|Skine sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Around [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],<ref name="date">''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]'' is set around six [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars:'' Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], which takes place in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], according to ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''.</ref> it served as the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Lucross Collections]], a [[loan shark]]ing and [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] laundering operation and member of the criminal [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]].<ref name="GG11" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wodenstam was mentioned in the [[1994]] sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]'', written by [[Rick D. Stuart]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GG11" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Wodenstam [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world Wodenstam, in grid square Q-19.<ref name="TEA" />
